---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem description

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Include example CLI usage or output if relevant.

```bash
# example
aigov scan . --new-flag
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you prefer this one?

## Additional context

Any links, references, or related issues that add context (e.g. regulatory text, upstream library docs).
